zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Lister於大約1460年出生在英國越可爾米德普斯同斯時，他的父親Christopher de Lister27歲，母親Joan Calverley19歲。他於從1484年到1486年與Elizabeth de Banester在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1538年7月在英國越可爾米德普享年79歲，埋葬在英國越可爾吉斯本。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Lister于大约1460年出生在英国越可爾米德普斯同斯时，他的父亲Christopher de Lister27岁，母亲Joan Calverley19岁。他于从1484年到1486年与Elizabeth de Banester在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1538年7月在英国越可爾米德普享年79岁，埋葬在英国越可爾吉斯本。

nameMeanings.name: Lister
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer of cloth, Middle English li(te)ster, a derivative of Middle English lit(t)en (Old Norse lita) ‘to dye’. This term was used principally in East Anglia and northern and eastern England (areas of Scandinavian settlement), and to this day the surname is found principally in these regions, especially in Yorkshire.

variants.name: Lester
meanings: English: habitational name from Leicester, which is recorded as Ligeraceastre in the 10th century. The placename derives from an Old English folk name Legore ‘the dwellers by the river Legor (a lost river name)’ + Old English ceaster ‘city, Roman fortification’.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lestre in Normandy.
English and Scottish: variant of   Lister  .

variants.name: Lyster
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Lister  .
Norwegian: habitational name from the farm name Ljøsta in Romsdal, probably derived from Old Norse ljóstr ‘fishing spear, leister’.
Danish: nickname originally from Bornholm, derived from a word for a fishing tackle for catching eel.

variants.name: Lidster
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer, Middle Englishlitster (see Lister ).

variants.name: Litster
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer, Middle Englishlitster (see Lister ).

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Simon , now rare, but more common in the Middle Ages, when it gave rise to the surnames Simms and Simpson.

variants.name: Simon
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Lister was born about 1460, in Midhopestones, Yorkshire, England, his father, Christopher de Lister, was 27 and his mother, Joan Calverley, was 19. He married Elizabeth de Banester from 1484 to 1486, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in July 1538, in Midhope, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 79, and was buried in Gisburn, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Lister est né environ 1460, à Midhopestones, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Christopher de Lister, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Joan Calverley, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Banester du 1484 au 1486, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en juillet 1538, à Midhope, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterré à Gisburn, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Lister um 1460 in Midhopestones, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Christopher de Lister 27 und seine Mutter Joan Calverley 19. Er hat von 1484 bis 1486 in Yorkshire, England Elizabeth de Banester geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb im Juli 1538 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Midhope, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Gisburn, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Lister è nato il circa 1460 nel Midhopestones, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Christopher de Lister, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Joan Calverley, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth de Banester da 1484 a 1486, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel luglio 1538, nel Midhope, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolto a Gisburn, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Listerが約1460年にイギリスヨークシュアイアミドhオペストーンスで生まれた時，父Christopher de Listerは27歳，母Joan Calverleyは19歳であった。から1484年まで1486年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでElizabeth de Banesterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1538年7月にイギリスヨークシュアイアミドhオペで79歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアギスブルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Lister(이)가 대략 1460년 영국 요르크실르 미드홉스톤스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Christopher de Lister(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Calverley(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1484년 부터 1486년 까지 영국 요르크실르에서 Elizabeth de Banester(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1538년 7월 영국 요르크실르 미드홉에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 지스번에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Lister nasceu aproximadamente 1460, em Midhopestones, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Christopher de Lister, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Joan Calverley, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Banester de 1484 a 1486, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em julho de 1538, em Midhope, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 79 anos, e foi sepultado em Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Lister родился около 1460 г. в местности мидхопестоунесь, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Christopher de Lister было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Calverley, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Banester с 1484 по 1486 в местности еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер июль 1538 г. в местности мидхоп, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 79 лет и был похоронен в местности гисбурн, еркшир, Англия.

sm.from 1484 to 1486: mai le 1484 e o'o I le 1486

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Lister nació aproximadamente 1460, en Midhopestones, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Christopher de Lister, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Joan Calverley, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Elizabeth de Banester desde 1484 hasta 1486, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en julio de 1538, en Midhope, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultado en Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
